headline: Dell AI PCs And Security Refresh Add A New Angle For Investors
summary: Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) has introduced a redesigned commercial device portfolio focused on portability, on-device AI, and enterprise security. The refresh spans new notebooks, desktops, and peripherals that are thinner, lighter, and built to support AI workloads. The devices feature AI ready silicon, modular thermal engineering, and advanced security capabilities, including quantum resistant features for enterprise clients.
